name: Residential property prices
description_short: Residential property price indices for euro area countries covering new and existing dwellings, with breakdowns by property type (apartment/house) and geographic coverage (urban/rural). Key dataset for housing market and macroprudential analysis.
use_cases: How have house prices evolved in Germany over the past decade?
Which euro area countries have seen the strongest property price growth?
How do apartment prices compare to house prices across euro area cities?
Are residential property prices overvalued relative to rents or incomes?
